name: SQLComposer
description: Generates SQL statements by replacing variable placeholders with corresponding values.

inputParameters.name: sql
inputParameters.description: SQL template with placeholders (e.g., 'SELECT * FROM #table# WHERE col = #value#').

inputParameters.name: variables
inputParameters.description: List of placeholder strings to be replaced.

inputParameters.name: values
inputParameters.description: List of replacement values corresponding to the placeholders.

outputParameters.name: statement
outputParameters.description: Final SQL statement after all replacements.
